description:
`src/lib/mdi/client.ts` is the **only** path to MDI's HTTP surface. Every other call site goes through it. Lint-enforced.

**Scope**
- Thin `fetch` wrapper that:
  - Pulls a token via `src/lib/mdi/token.ts` (T-053).
  - Sets `Authorization: Bearer ...`, `Content-Type: application/json`, `Accept: application/json`.
  - On 401 → `token.forceRefresh()` + single retry.
  - On 418 (maintenance) → exponential backoff with jitter, max 6 retries over ~10 min, then throw `MdiUnavailableError` for the caller to handle (T-064 maintenance banner).
  - On 5xx → retry 3x with jitter, then throw `MdiServerError` (no silent drop, alarm fires).
  - On 4xx (not 401) → no retry, throw `MdiClientError` with the response body.
  - Trace propagation: emit OTEL spans named `mdi.<endpoint>` with status code attribute.
- An ESLint rule (custom or `no-restricted-imports`) prevents direct `fetch('https://api.mdintegrations...')` anywhere in the repo.
- Typed wrappers for each endpoint family land in sibling files: `patients.ts`, `cases.ts`, `subscriptions.ts`, `files.ts`, `embedded.ts`.

**Acceptance**
- Grep audit: zero raw `mdintegrations.com` strings outside `src/lib/mdi/`.
- Fixture test: 418 response cycles backoff and eventually throws `MdiUnavailableError`; 5xx retries 3x.
title: MDI HTTP client (single entrypoint, lint-enforced)
